value.IndicatorName: Age-standardized mortality rate by cause (per 100 000 population) - Cardiovascular
Availability of cardiovascular risk stratification in 50% or more primary health care facilities
Existence of evidence-based national guidelines/protocols/standards for the management of cardiovascular diseases
Existence of operational policy/strategy/action plan for cardiovascular diseases
In-prison cardiovascular disease diagnosis (number of diagnoses)
Probability (%) of dying between age 30 and exact age 70 from any of cardiovascular disease, cancer, diabetes, or chronic respiratory disease
